rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (contribution), shows where the draft drifts from it (contradictory contribution claim), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('first' dataset).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unsupported causal attribution to 'entity-neighborhood information').
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
